lessons: On first deployment, resist the urge to fill the portfolio immediately. 3 positions at ~26% deployed preserves optionality for better entries and regime confirmation over subsequent weeks.
When all three of RSI momentum, MACD trend, and OBV institutional flow align bullishly — that is the highest-quality entry signal. Require all three before opening a position, not just one or two.

lessons: Lesson 8: When OBV falls AND MACD turns bearish simultaneously on a LONG position, consider discretionary early exit (before the full triple-signal SMA50 breach) when ALL of the following apply: (1) position is at a loss or minimal gain, (2) a known fundamental weakness exists (thin margins, accounting risk, execution history concerns), and (3) ADX is below 25 (no strong institutional trend to sustain a recovery). belief_updates.name: ADX Is the Master Contextualizer for All Technical Signals
belief_updates.description: ADX > 35 confirms institutional commitment to a directional move and overrides misleading counter-signals. Specifically: (1) Don't exit a short because RSI hits 30 — if ADX > 35, the institutional downtrend is real and sustained, not a bounce setup (Lesson 3, score 6). (2) Don't exit a long because MACD turns bearish — if OBV is rising, institutions are buying the dip and the trend will reassert (Lesson 5, score 5). Never act on RSI or MACD signals in isolation without checking ADX first. ADX > 35 = institutional conviction is driving the move.

lessons: Lesson 9: When a SHORT target announces M&A exploration or banker retention, evaluate deal quality before deciding to cover. Companies in structural decline that pursue acquisitions of other declining assets typically: (1) increase leverage on an already deteriorating revenue base, (2) signal management has exhausted organic growth options, and (3) create integration complexity that accelerates value destruction. Treat M&A by a declining company as thesis confirmation unless the acquisition target is genuinely high-growth and the acquisition price would force a cover above your stop. The tell: healthy companies acquire growing assets; structurally declining companies acquire other declining assets to hide the decay. Trigger condition: short target retains bankers — first assess whether the potential deal is growth-accretive or decline-consolidating before acting.

belief_updates.name: ADX Is the Master Contextualizer for All Technical Signals
belief_updates.description: ADX > 35 confirms institutional commitment to a directional move and overrides misleading counter-signals in both directions. For longs: don't exit because MACD turns bearish — if OBV is rising AND ADX > 35, institutions are buying the dip and the trend will reassert (Lesson 5). For shorts: don't hold because RSI hits 30 — if ADX > 35, the institutional downtrend is real and sustained (Lesson 3). Critically, the inverse also applies: when a short position's ADX falls toward or below 35 while MACD turns bullish, the institutional conviction supporting the short is eroding — this is an early exit warning even before full Lesson 6 trigger is met (Lessons 6, 11). ADX is the single most important contextualizer before acting on any RSI or MACD signal.

lessons: Lesson 16: When a LONG position's stated stop price is breached by current market price AND the position is at a loss exceeding 10%, EXIT with discipline even when the company's fundamentals have materially improved since entry. Improving fundamentals on a stop-breached position typically indicates the original entry was timed too aggressively into a momentum peak — the stock priced in the good news before the entry, and price action has since confirmed that read. Improved fundamentals are a reason to RE-ENTER after technical reset, not a reason to override the stop. The stop exists to bound downside; holding through it while waiting for fundamentals to re-rate the stock creates indefinite loss exposure with no defined exit. Trigger conditions: current price < stated stop price AND position at a loss greater than 10%.

new_positions.thesis: Nvidia is the dominant GPU and AI accelerator company with an unmatched software ecosystem (CUDA) and the primary beneficiary of expanding AI inference infrastructure demand. Our AI Infrastructure theme is at 5/5 conviction yet we carry zero NVDA exposure — a critical gap in theme expression that must be corrected. AI inference workloads are growing exponentially as models move from training to production deployment at scale, and Nvidia's Blackwell architecture maintains a multi-year moat through both hardware superiority and software lock-in that competitors cannot quickly replicate. RevGr=+22%, Margin=56%, D/E=0.09 — best-in-class fundamentals in the entire universe. All three Lesson 2 entry signals aligned: RSI=56 (healthy building momentum, not extended), MACD bullish (trend confirmed), OBV rising (institutional accumulation underway). Above SMA50. ADX=13 is early-stage, appropriate for entry ahead of trend confirmation — analogous to PLTR at ADX=15 and DXCM at ADX=19 at entry. MU +22.1% and named Top 10 Large-Cap Gainer confirms AI infrastructure demand is accelerating into 2026; NVDA captures that demand at the GPU layer above MU's memory layer.
new_positions.invalidation: Triple distribution signal (below SMA50 + MACD bearish + OBV falling simultaneously). Per Lesson 14: if hyperscalers announce material-scale adoption of competing silicon (AMD MI300X, Google TPU, Amazon Trainium) combined with triple distribution signal, exit is high-conviction. Thesis also weakened if AI capex cycle shows signs of digestion pause (hyperscaler capex guidance cuts).
new_positions.timing_note: RSI=56, MACD bullish, OBV rising — all three Lesson 2 signals aligned. ADX=13 early-stage but entry justified by 5/5 theme conviction and best-in-class fundamentals.

new_positions.thesis: Regeneron is one of the highest-margin biopharmaceutical companies in the Healthcare Aging universe, with Dupixent (atopic dermatitis, asthma, COPD) driving durable recurring revenue and a deep pipeline in oncology (Libtayo), eye disease (Eylea/Eylea HD), and cardiovascular. Our Healthcare Biotech theme (5/5 conviction) captures aging demographics, immunology demand, and oncology breakthroughs — Regeneron covers all three. Adds critical immunology and ophthalmology exposure to our healthcare basket alongside VRTX (rare disease/CF) and DXCM (metabolic monitoring), creating genuine diversification within the theme rather than overlap. new_positions.invalidation: Dupixent loses meaningful market share to emerging IL-4/IL-13 competitors. FDA rejection of a major pipeline candidate. Triple distribution signal triggered. Revenue growth turns negative for two consecutive quarters. Price breaches stop at $670.
new_positions.timing_note: RSI=65 momentum building but not extended, MACD bullish, OBV rising. ADX=30 provides stronger trend validation than most entries in portfolio — cleaner setup than SCHW (RSI=70) or V (RSI=69).
